blockers.evidence: The starter skirmish uses offline/starterMap.tsx, but engine art, unit descriptions, character references, and music still include upstream content.
blockers.required: Replace remaining upstream in-game art/content before public distribution.

blockers.evidence: Capacitor config exists, but native Android/iOS projects are not present in this checkout.
blockers.required: Generate and smoke test native mobile wrappers from dist/offline.

requiredChecks: corepack pnpm verify:production validates required files, forbidden references, starter map shape, manifest icons, service worker cache/fallback/update flow, runtime error fallback, main menu labels, non-placeholder options, versioned local save/continue/delete wiring, and PWA install prompt wiring
